goals.title: Implement a Product Auto Setup and approved 7-day campaign-start work...
goals.objective: Implement a Product Auto Setup and approved 7-day campaign-start workflow for Portfolio Growth OS. The user wants the better direction discussed: when registering or configuring a product, the system should help infer a marketing brief from product name/description/landing URL, produce editable product profile, topics, system prompt, active experiment, readiness score, and only start campaign generation after user approval. Deliver an end-to-end working MVP inside /Users/kim-young-gwang/Desktop/projects/threads-uploader using strict TDD and real manual QA. Required success criteria: happy path auto setup draft from product input, edge case insufficient/malformed product input returns actionable readiness gaps and no campaign start, browser create/settings flow submits/saves auto setup and readiness, start 7-day campaign button generates approved product_growth campaign posts only after readiness passes, adjacent regressions preserve existing CosmicPath/product_growth/TikTok-disabled/account-discovery behavior. Evidence must include RED to GREEN tests and HTTP/browser artifacts under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence plus cleanup receipts.

successCriteria.scenario: Product registration happy path: auto-setup preview for a well-described product returns a ready draft, and creating the product persists profile, prompt, topics, formulas, product_growth campaign, and 7-day active experiment.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: RED/GREEN tests plus HTTP/browser artifacts under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/019e9180-d682-7553-aa30-cb52004e2102/C001-* proving ready score >= 80, product_growth campaign, non-empty setup fields, and persisted approved config.
successCriteria.notes: Ready product auto-setup returns score 100, canStartCampaign true, product_growth campaign, non-empty topics/formulas, and browser create modal exposes auto setup controls.

successCriteria.scenario: Insufficient or malformed product context: auto-setup preview returns actionable readiness gaps and a not-ready state, and campaign start remains blocked instead of silently inventing a ready campaign.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: RED/GREEN tests plus HTTP/browser artifacts under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/019e9180-d682-7553-aa30-cb52004e2102/C002-* proving missing description/landing/target fields produce gaps, score below ready threshold, and no ready campaign-start state.
successCriteria.notes: Missing, malformed, and protocol-relative product context are blocked. Campaign start panel also disables blank campaign landing URL.

successCriteria.scenario: Adjacent regression: existing product_growth generation, account-discovery product mode, TikTok-disabled baseline, generic product wording, and campaign UTM behavior remain intact after auto-setup/start changes.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Targeted regression tests plus manual/browser smoke artifacts under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/019e9180-d682-7553-aa30-cb52004e2102/C003-* proving no CosmicPath/career injection, TikTok product baseline disabled, product account discovery keywords, existing generate readiness/UTM tests, and cleanup receipts.
successCriteria.notes: Final regression evidence includes round2 fixes. Product growth server gate and UI start readiness agree on blank/malformed campaign landing; final test/typecheck/lint/build pass.

goals.evidence: G001-implement-a-product-auto-setup-and-a complete: implementation and validation recorded against .omo/ulw-loop/019e9180-d682-7553-aa30-cb52004e2102/goals.json and ledger.jsonl. Evidence includes product auto setup API/UI, approved campaign start gate, npm test/typecheck/lint/build passed, HTTP/browser QA artifacts, final-ulw-quality-gate.md, and codex-ultrawork-reviewer UNCONDITIONAL APPROVAL.
